metadata.title: Expertlar Professional Services — Industrial Safety & NDT
metadata.description: Expertlar Professional Services — a leading company specializing in industrial safety, non-destructive testing (NDT), and technical expertise.

hero.title: Professional Industrial Safety & NDT Services
hero.subtitle: We ensure the safe and reliable operation of industrial facilities

about.title: About the Company
about.subtitle: Comprehensive solutions in industrial safety
about.companyIntro: Private enterprise «EXPERTLAR» is a team of professionals specializing in comprehensive solutions in the field of industrial safety, diagnostics, and protection of strategically important facilities.
about.companyServicesTitle: We provide a full range of services in non-destructive testing, technical inspection, protection and maintenance:
about.service1: Non-destructive testing laboratory for tanks, pipelines, and metal structures
about.service3: Anti-corrosion protection of metal structures, pipelines, and tanks
about.service4: Fireproofing treatment of metal structures and power cables
about.service5: Thermal and cold insulation of tanks, pipelines, and pressure vessels
about.service6: Supply and sale of measuring instruments
about.principlesIntro: We understand that tanks, pipelines, and metal structures are facilities of heightened responsibility. The safety of people, production stability, and financial sustainability of the enterprise depend on their condition.
about.principlesSubtitle: That is why in our work we rely on:
about.why1Text: We support facilities from diagnostics and calibration to complete anti-corrosion and fire protection.
about.why2Text: Our non-destructive testing laboratory provides reliable results without stopping production processes.
about.why3Text: We apply proven protection technologies that extend equipment service life and reduce operational risks.
about.why4Text: Every project for us is an individual task with specific requirements and deadlines. We build long-term partnerships based on trust and responsibility.
about.missionText: To enhance the level of industrial safety and infrastructure reliability for our clients by ensuring diagnostic precision, protection quality, and professional service.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive services in industrial safety and NDT
services.ndtDesc: Inspection of equipment and structures using ultrasonic, radiographic, magnetic, and other modern NDT methods.
services.safetyDesc: Expertise and audit services to ensure the safe operation of industrial facilities.
services.inspectionDesc: Assessment and inspection of the technical condition of equipment, pipelines, and structures.
services.certificationDesc: ISO-compliant certification and conformity assessment services.
services.trainingDesc: Professional development courses and training in industrial safety and NDT.
services.consultingDesc: Consulting and strategic planning in industrial safety.

equipment.title: Kropus Measurement Instruments
equipment.subtitle: We supply and use professional equipment manufactured by Kropus (Russia) for non-destructive testing and diagnostics
equipment.device1Desc: General-purpose ultrasonic flaw detector. Designed for detection and coordinate determination of internal defects in welds, forgings, castings, and base metal.
equipment.device2Desc: Ultrasonic flaw detector-tomograph with phased arrays. Provides real-time visualization of the internal structure of the object.
equipment.device3Desc: Magnetic particle flaw detector for detection of surface and near-surface defects in ferromagnetic materials using MPT method.
equipment.device4Desc: Eddy current flaw detector for detection of surface and near-surface defects in electrically conductive materials.
equipment.device5Desc: Ultrasonic thickness gauge. High-precision measurement of wall thickness of pipes, vessels, and metal structures. Compact, lightweight, and reliable.
equipment.device6Desc: Universal hardness tester. Measurement of metal hardness using Brinell, Rockwell, and Vickers methods without destroying the sample.

clients.testimonial1: Expertlar provides a full cycle of non-destructive testing at our facilities. Professional approach and precise results.
clients.testimonial2: Tank calibration was completed on schedule in compliance with all standards. We recommend Expertlar as a reliable partner.
clients.testimonial3: Anti-corrosion protection of our facilities was performed at the highest level. We have been working with Expertlar for over 5 years.

ndt-laboratory.title: Non-Destructive Testing Laboratory
ndt-laboratory.subtitle: Comprehensive diagnostics of tanks, pipelines, and metal structures without compromising their integrity
ndt-laboratory.intro: Our NDT laboratory is equipped with state-of-the-art equipment and staffed with qualified specialists certified to international standards. We conduct a full range of inspections to detect defects at early stages.
ndt-laboratory.method1Desc: Detection of internal defects in metal — cracks, porosity, lack of fusion, and delamination. Used for inspection of welds, forgings, castings, and base metal.
ndt-laboratory.method2Desc: Detection of surface and near-surface defects in ferromagnetic materials. High sensitivity to cracks, incomplete fusion, and other discontinuities.
ndt-laboratory.method2Feature1: Detection of cracks as narrow as 1 μm
ndt-laboratory.method2Feature2: Testing under UV and white light
ndt-laboratory.method3Desc: Precise measurement of residual wall thickness of tanks, pipelines, and pressure vessels. Determination of corrosion rate and prediction of remaining service life.
ndt-laboratory.method4Desc: Detection of surface and near-surface defects in electrically conductive materials without surface contact. Effective for inspection of tubes, rods, and sheet metal.
ndt-laboratory.method4Feature3: Testing through coatings up to 5 mm
ndt-laboratory.standard1: GOST 14782 — Ultrasonic testing of welded joints

calibration.title: Tank and Pipeline Calibration
calibration.subtitle: High-precision determination of tank capacity with compilation of calibration tables for commercial metering
calibration.intro: Tank calibration (gauging) is the process of determining the exact capacity of a vessel and compiling calibration tables. This data is critically important for the commercial accounting of oil, petroleum products, and chemical liquids.
calibration.geometricDesc: Precise measurement of tank linear parameters (diameter, height, wall thickness, ovality) for building calibration tables without filling the vessel with liquid.
calibration.geometricFeature1: Ideal for new and repaired tanks
calibration.geometricFeature2: Does not require filling with liquid
calibration.geometricFeature3: Accounts for ovality and shell deformations
calibration.volumetricDesc: Sequential filling of the tank with measured liquid for maximum commercial accounting accuracy. Especially effective for complex geometry vessels.
calibration.app3: Tanks for oil and petroleum products

inline-diagnostics.title: In-Line Diagnostics
inline-diagnostics.subtitle: Comprehensive inspection and cleaning of trunk pipelines using intelligent inspection tools
inline-diagnostics.intro: In-line diagnostics allows assessment of pipeline condition from the inside without stopping pumping operations. We use modern intelligent pistons (pigs) to detect corrosion, cracks, and geometric anomalies.
inline-diagnostics.method1Desc: Detection of metal loss, corrosion damage, and pipe wall defects using magnetic flux leakage.
inline-diagnostics.method2Desc: Direct wall thickness measurement and high-resolution crack detection.
inline-diagnostics.method3Desc: Detection of dents, ovality, bends, and other geometric anomalies in the pipe profile.

anti-corrosion.title: Anti-Corrosion Protection
anti-corrosion.subtitle: Comprehensive protection systems for metal structures, pipelines, and tanks against corrosion
anti-corrosion.intro: We develop and implement comprehensive anti-corrosion protection solutions for oil & gas, chemical, and energy sector facilities. Our coatings provide reliable protection in the most aggressive environments.
anti-corrosion.method1Desc: Coating systems for tanks storing gasoline, kerosene, crude oil. Internal and external protection tailored to the stored product specifications.
anti-corrosion.method2Desc: Insulating coatings for underground and aboveground pipelines. Polyethylene, polyurethane, epoxy systems.
anti-corrosion.method3Desc: Anti-corrosion treatment of metal structures for industrial facilities, bridges, and overpasses.
anti-corrosion.result1: Work completion report with photo documentation
anti-corrosion.standard2: ISO 12944 — Protective paint coatings against corrosion

fireproofing.title: Fireproofing Treatment
fireproofing.subtitle: Increasing fire resistance of metal structures and power cables
fireproofing.intro: Fireproofing treatment involves applying special compounds that form a thermal insulation layer under high temperatures, protecting structures from deformation and destruction.
fireproofing.method1Desc: Application of intumescent and non-intumescent compounds to achieve fire resistance ratings from R30 to R120.
fireproofing.method2Desc: Treatment of cable routes with fire-retardant paints and pastes to prevent fire spread.
fireproofing.standard1: GOST 53295 — Fire protection for metal structures
fireproofing.standard3: NPB 236 — Fire retardant compounds and substances

insulation.title: Thermal and Cold Insulation
insulation.subtitle: Thermal and cold insulation of tanks, pipelines, and pressure vessels
insulation.intro: We perform thermal and cold insulation of industrial equipment. Proper insulation ensures energy efficiency, prevents condensation, and protects personnel from burns.
insulation.method1Desc: Protection of hot surfaces to reduce heat loss. Mineral wool, polyurethane foam, foamed rubber.
insulation.method2Desc: Prevention of condensation on cold pipelines and tanks. Foam glass, foamed polyethylene.
insulation.result1: Work completion report with photo documentation
insulation.standard1: SNiP 41-03 — Thermal insulation of equipment and pipelines
insulation.standard2: GOST 30732 — Pipes and fittings with thermal insulation
